full_text:
Guo Daxian [Guo Great-Virtue]
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guo Daxian [Guo Great-Virtue]. Bandit leader, attacked and killed by Yuan Shao. Guo Daxian [Guo Great-Virtue] lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
